title: Workers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|The Workers lived in a separate sector of the city in poor housing and had to pass through checkpoints at an energy wall to travel to work.|[[Tahl]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]''</ref>}}
'''The Workers''', or '''Workers''', were a group comprising members of specific political, economical, and social classes on [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]]. As their name implies, they were composed of the poor and the laborers among the New Apsolon population. The Workers were political opponents of the richer class, known as [[Civilized|the Civilized]], and were involved in overthrowing [[Absolutes|the Absolutes]], who were the dictatorial leaders of New Apsolon.

==Notable Workers==
*[[Ewane]]
*[[Eritha]] (actually in an alliance with the Absolutes)
*[[Alani]] (actually in an alliance with the Absolutes)
*[[Lenz]]
*[[Irini]]
*[[Manex]] (actually one of the Civilized, but in alliance with the Workers)
*[[Balog (Human)|Balog]] (actually in an alliance with the Absolutes)
*[[Roan]] (actually one of the Civilized, but in alliance with the Workers)
